hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Main.general_idea: Register additional entity classes (Laptop, Passport, ClassRoom) in the Hibernate configuration to support new domain models.
Implement explicit transactional persistence for related entities (Laptops, Passport, ClassRoom) before saving the main Student entity to handle relationships correctly.
Refactor Student instantiation to use a builder pattern and include references to the newly created related entities.
Add Read, Update, and Delete operations to demonstrate full lifecycle management of the Student entity.
Ensure Hibernate Session and SessionFactory are properly closed after operations to prevent resource leaks.

hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.general_idea: Replace manual getters and setters with the @Data annotation to reduce boilerplate code.
hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.human_impl: Added @Data and removed getId, setId, getSname, setSname, getSage, setSage methods.

hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.general_idea: Replace manual constructor with @AllArgsConstructor and @NoArgsConstructor annotations.
hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.human_impl: Added @AllArgsConstructor and @NoArgsConstructor and removed the explicit public Student(long id, String sname, int sage) constructor.

hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.general_idea: Enable the builder pattern for the entity using the @Builder annotation.
Explicitly define the ID generation strategy using JPA annotations.
hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.human_impl: Added @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY) to the id field.

hibernate/src/main/java/com/example/Stud.general_idea: Add a one-to-one relationship field to the entity.
Add a one-to-many relationship field to the entity.
Add a many-to-many relationship field to the entity.

hibernate/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Project Lombok as a compile-time dependency to reduce boilerplate code.

hibernate/src/main/resources/hibernate.c.general_idea: Switched Hibernate schema generation from update to create to ensure a fresh database schema on startup.
Enabled SQL statement logging to the console for debugging purposes.
Enabled formatted SQL output to improve readability of logged queries.
Explicitly configured the PostgreSQL dialect to ensure correct SQL generation for the target database.

hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.general_idea: Switch Hibernate schema generation from incremental updates to full recreation on startup.
Enable console output of executed SQL statements for debugging purposes.
hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.human_impl: Added property hibernate.show_sql set to true.

hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.general_idea: Format logged SQL statements for better readability.
hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.human_impl: Added property hibernate.format_sql set to true.

hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.general_idea: Explicitly define the PostgreSQL dialect for Hibernate to ensure correct SQL generation.
hibernate/target/classes/hibernate.cfg.x.human_impl: Added property hibernate.dialect set to org.hibernate.dialect.PostgreSQLDialect.
